rulings.Case Title: AMEZCUA VS ALANSI
rulings.Rulings: CROSS-DEFENDANTS HUAHN GROUP'S DEMURRER: 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION CONTRIBUTION: CROSS-COMPLAINANT STIPULATES TO REMOVE. 8TH CAUSE OF ACTION NEGLIGENT MISREPRESENTATION: OVERRULE (ADEQUATELY ALLEGES FACTS SUFFICIENT, NOT BARRED BY STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS). 9TH CAUSE OF ACTION BREACH OF CONTRACT: OVERRULE (ADEQUATELY ALLEGES FACTS SUFFICIENT, NOT BARRED BY STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. 10TH CAUSE OF ACTION FRAUD: SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND (NOT PLED WITH PARTICULARITY/SPECIFICITY). (302/AJR/RS)

rulings.Case Title: AMEZCUA VS ALANSI
rulings.Rulings: CROSS-DEFENDANT APPLE'S DEMURRER: 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION DECLARATORY RELIEF, 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION EQUITABLE INDEMNIFICATION, 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION COMPARATIVE INDEMNIFICATION SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE. 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION CONTRIBUTION: ALANSI HAS STIPULATED TO REMOVE. 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION FRAUD: SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND (FAILURE TO ALLEGE FACTS WITH SUFFICIENT PARTICULARITY). 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION NEGLIGENT MISREPRESENTATION: SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND (FAILS TO ALLEGE FACTS WITH PARTICULARITY). 7TH CAUSE OF ACTION BREACH OF CONTRACT: SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND (FAILS TO ALLEGE CONTRACT TERMS WITH SUFFICIENT SPECIFICITY). (302/AJR/RS)
